detail: p1-p2-evidence-ledger mainline scaffold created. Schema anchor = evidence_ledger_entry. Six invariants (PIT-201..PIT-206) form the validator baseline.
Scope = Gulei-class emergency response + Polymarket/Gulei settlement. Free-text reasoning traces (P11) excluded as evidence input; routed via PIT-207 / PIT-408.

10 handcrafted evidence_ledger_entry rows in experiments/ledger/pilot_10.jsonl. All 5 factor_types (precedent/inhibitor/branch/falsifier/authority) covered. All 6 PIT invariants (PIT-201..PIT-206) enforced by validate_ledger.py. 10/10 unit tests GREEN.
mitigation: Each row declared contradicting_evidence OR missing_prerequisites

detail: 2 entries flagged stale via PIT-203 (freshness_ratio > 1.0): C-P1P2-004 (1.3, PT30M window) and C-P1P2-007 (11.7, P365D window). aged_entries.jsonl auto-generated by validator.
mitigation: Validator flags stale; downstream audit script (M6) will demote or remove stale claims

detail: Direction selected for M2 (settlement mapping): map Gulei 2015 incident official outcomes (14 documented policy timepoints per 09-gulei-retrospective-validation.md) to settlement_rule on >=30 claim factors. Polymarket excluded for M2 because Gulei chemical-event markets are illiquid; defer Polymarket to M5 pilot expansion.
mitigation: Decision recorded in directions_tried.json as p1p2_m2_settlement_gulei

finding: P1+P2 M2 complete: pilot_30.jsonl has 30 evidence_ledger_entry rows (5 factor_types covered, 28/30 settleable, un_settleable_ratio=0.07, all 6 PIT invariants pass). settlement_mapping.md documents 28 claim-to-source mappings to Gulei 2015 official record.

P1+P2 cross-paper bridge: C-P1P2-028 tests P8 calc_brier pipeline via simulated Polymarket baseline_difference; C-P1P2-027 carries P12 5-persona review finding (blind > leaked) as evidence_ledger factor to be settled by P12 full 450-run.
P1+P2 M9 5-persona review COMPLETE. 5 distinct model_ids. Scores: R1=5.0, R2=5.0, R3=3.0, R4=4.0, R5=3.0. Median=4.0 < 6.5 threshold. Verdict=fold_into_p12 (per task_spec section 6).
Reviewer R5 (qwen3.5-122b-a10b) named the PIT-201 row-5 validator miss as engineering critique, mapping to actual bug history this session.

Reviewer R3 (MiniMax-M3) named Gulei single-incident overfit + 7% un_settleable rate cherry-picked suspicion. Factor-type-conditional-effect overfit risk from M3 power analysis expressed by third party.
P1+P2 standalone paper CLOSED. Carry 14-field evidence_ledger_entry + 6-PIT-invariants validator + factor-type taxonomy + P12 5-protocol design into a methods paper (joint P1+P2 + P12 submission).
